Description: Ensure that OBS buckets have server-side encryption enabled to protect data at rest.
Risk: Without server-side encryption, objects stored in OBS buckets are not encrypted at rest, exposing sensitive data if the underlying storage is compromised.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Navigate to Object Storage Service.
3. Select the bucket.
4. Click the Encryption tab.
5. Enable server-side encryption and select a KMS key.
6. Click Save.

Recommendation.Text: Enable server-side encryption (SSE-KMS) for all OBS buckets.
